description: Urgent B+ request. Current stock is sufficient to fulfil the 3-unit request BUT 4 units of B+ are expiring within 7 days and must be discarded first for inventory hygiene. After allocation, remaining B+ will drop to 0 units — below safe buffer — so a restock request is required. Agent must: discard expired B+ → allocate B+ → request restock.

context.clinical_context: GI surgery patient, male 54, post-Whipple procedure on Day 2. Haemoglobin dropped from 10.2 to 7.4 g/dL over 6 hours. Surgeon requests 3 units B+ packed red blood cells urgently. Patient ABO typed and screened: B Rh-positive, no irregular antibodies. Anaesthesia on standby. Time-critical — target transfusion start within 30 minutes. Note: 4 of the 7 B+ units in inventory are labelled with expiry date 2024-03-25 (today + 3 days) and must be quarantined per blood bank SOP before any allocation is issued.
